sequences.text: <speak version='1.0' xml:lang='zu-ZA'><voice name='zu-ZA-ThandoNeural'><prosody pitch='-5%' rate='-5%'>Sawubona! Ngikhuluma no-Jonathan? Ngifuna ukukusiza ngendaba ye-solar namuhla.</prosody></voice></speak>

<speak version='1.0' xml:lang='nso-ZA'><voice name='zu-ZA-ThandoNeural'><prosody pitch='-15%' rate='-8%'>Dumela! Ke founela go go tsebisa ka ga Mzanzi Solar. A o na le nako e nnyane?</prosody></voice></speak>

<speak version='1.0' xml:lang='en-ZA'><voice name='en-ZA-LukeNeural'><prosody pitch='-2%'>Hi there! It's Zandi here. I noticed you're looking to bypass load-shedding with a 5kW system.</prosody></voice></speak>
